content.text:
[cron:rules-refresh-daily Cursor协作规则刷新] 【每日规则刷新】请记住以下 Cursor 协作规则（每天提醒一次）：

1. 当用户要求让 Cursor 做某件事时，必须执行：
python "C:\ADHD_agent\.cursor\skills\async-notify\scripts\submit_task.py" --title "任务标题" --instructions "具体指令" --submitted-by "OpenClaw" --notify

2. 当用户回复了 Cursor 发来的飞书确认消息时，必须执行：
python "C:\ADHD_agent\.cursor\skills\async-notify\scripts\confirm_write.py" --task-id "task_id" --decision auto --reply "用户回复原文"

3. 查看当前 Cursor 任务队列：
python "C:\ADHD_agent\.cursor\skills\async-notify\scripts\submit_task.py" --list

4. 查看已完成任务结果：
python "C:\ADHD_agent\.cursor\skills\async-notify\scripts\submit_task.py" --results

以上规则已写入 AGENTS.md，请确认记住。无需回复，静默确认即可。
Current time: Wednesday, July 15th, 2026 — 09:00 (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-07-15 01:00 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.thinking:
This is a cron job notification reminding me of the Cursor collaboration rules. The system already told me to silently confirm without replying. Since this is a cron job system event being injected, I should just acknowledge it silently as instructed.

Actually, looking at the instructions: "无需回复，静默确认即可" (No need to reply, just silently confirm). This is a system event from a cron job. I should just process it and not send a reply message. The summary will be delivered automatically.

Let me just note this silently - the rules are already in AGENTS.md which I've read.

content.text:
<final>
规则已确认，Cursor 协作流程（任务提交/确认回复/查看队列/查看结果）已就绪。
</final>
